name: Bloody Bunny The First Blood
overview: Bloody Bunny is a knife-wielding rabbit with the vengeful soul of a quiet little girl who travels on a perilous journey across a dark land to find and destroy her malevolent creator and return to a human body - all whilst kicking the crap out of and killing a lot of monsters along the way.
